name: One Stop Auto Repair
tagline: Honest, full-service auto repair on Piner Road in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: One Stop Auto Repair is a Santa Rosa, CA shop offering honest, fairly priced repair and maintenance for cars, trucks, and SUVs — brakes, oil changes, diagnostics, AC, tune-ups, and engine and transmission work. No appointment needed. Open Mon–Sat, se habla español.

sections.eyebrow: Piner Road · Santa Rosa · Cars · Trucks · SUVs
sections.heading: The honest shop your car keeps coming back to
sections.subheading: One Stop Auto Repair handles it all — brakes, oil, diagnostics, AC, tune-ups, and major engine and transmission work — at prices you can actually beat. No appointment needed. Just pull in.

sections.heading: Straight answers, fair prices, real work
sections.intro: We earned our reputation the only way a neighborhood shop can — by treating every car, and every customer, the way we'd want our own family treated.

items.title: Honest, every time
items.body: We tell you what your vehicle actually needs — and what it doesn't. No upsells, no scare tactics, no surprise line items.

items.title: Fair prices, quoted up front
items.body: Customers tell us our pricing is the best around. You get a fair quote before the work starts — so you always know the number first.

items.title: One stop for everything
items.body: From a quick oil change to a full engine or transmission rebuild, it all gets done under one roof — so you're not bounced between shops.

sections.heading: Full-service repair and maintenance
sections.intro: Cars, trucks, and SUVs — foreign and domestic. If it drives, we can fix it.

items.title: Brakes & Rotors
items.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, and brake-line service to keep your stops safe and quiet.

items.title: Oil Changes & Maintenance
items.description: Fast, no-appointment oil changes plus the scheduled maintenance that keeps small problems from becoming big ones.

items.title: Diagnostics & Check-Engine
items.description: Computer diagnostics to find the real cause behind that warning light — before you spend money guessing.

items.title: Engine & Transmission
items.description: Major repair and full rebuilds, plus timing belts, water pumps, and the heavy work most quick-lube shops won't touch.

items.title: Heating & A/C
items.description: A/C service and recharge, radiators, and cooling-system work to keep you comfortable through Sonoma County summers.

items.title: Tune-Ups & Electrical
items.description: Tune-ups, alternators, suspension, catalytic converters, and the electrical gremlins that are hard to chase down.

sections.heading: Just pull in — we'll take it from there
sections.body: Most repairs don't happen on a schedule, so neither do we. Drive up during business hours and we'll get eyes on your vehicle and a straight quote before any work begins.
points: Honest quotes before the work starts

sections.heading: Car making a noise? Bring it by.
sections.body: Find us at 1688 Piner Rd in Santa Rosa. Open Monday–Saturday, 8:30am–6:00pm. Call ahead or just pull in.

sections.heading: One shop, every repair
sections.subheading: From routine maintenance to major mechanical work, One Stop Auto Repair keeps cars, trucks, and SUVs on the road — without sending you across town for the next job.

items.description: Conventional and synthetic oil changes, no appointment required.

sections.heading: Trucks and commercial vehicles, too
sections.body: We don't just handle the family sedan. One Stop services light trucks, SUVs, and commercial vehicles — so small businesses around Santa Rosa can keep their fleet moving.
points: Honest quotes before the work starts

sections.heading: Not sure what's wrong? Let's find out.
sections.body: Bring it in and we'll diagnose it straight — no guessing, no padding the bill.

sections.heading: A neighborhood shop built on a fair deal
sections.subheading: On Piner Road in Santa Rosa, doing right by drivers — one honest quote at a time.

sections.heading: The shop drivers actually trust
body: One Stop Auto Repair sits on Piner Road in Santa Rosa, where it has built its name the hard way — by being straight with people. The idea behind the shop is right there in the reviews: honest work, fair prices, and a mechanic who tells you what your car really needs.

It's a full-service shop by design. Instead of sending you to one place for brakes, another for A/C, and a third for a transmission, One Stop does it all under one roof — from a five-minute oil change to a complete engine rebuild. Walk-ins are welcome, no appointment needed, and the team works with English- and Spanish-speaking customers alike.
highlights: Cars, trucks, SUVs, and commercial vehicles

sections.heading: Simple, start to finish
sections.intro: Getting your car fixed here is refreshingly free of runaround.

items.title: Pull in
items.body: Drive up during business hours — no appointment required. Tell us what's going on, or what light came on.

items.title: Get a straight quote
items.body: We look it over, find the real problem, and give you an honest price before any work begins.

items.title: Drive away fixed
items.body: We do the work right the first time and hand the keys back ready for the road.

sections.heading: Honest is a competitive advantage
sections.body: Plenty of shops can turn a wrench. What keeps Santa Rosa drivers coming back to One Stop is the trust — knowing the diagnosis is real and the price is fair.
points: Most honest mechanic around, per the reviews
Prices customers say you can't beat

sections.heading: Visit One Stop Auto Repair
sections.blurb: Find us at 1688 Piner Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95403, or call (707) 536-9053. Open Monday–Saturday, 8:30am–6:00pm. No appointment necessary — se habla español.
